name: Favorite Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all cookie ingredients. Beat at low speed, scraping the bowl often, until well mixed (1 to 2 minutes).
2. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
3. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough one-third at a time until it is about 1/4-inch thick.
5. Cut with 3-inch cookie cutters and place about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 6 to 10 minutes or until edges are lightly browned. Allow to cool completely.
7. In a small mixing bowl, combine all frosting ingredients except milk. Beat at low speed, gradually adding enough milk for the desired spreading consistency.
8. Frost cooled cookies. For variety, divide dough into thirds before refrigerating. Color 2/3 of the dough with desired food colorings. Before baking, colored sugars may be sprinkled on the cookies. The frosting can also be colored and used as decoration.
